Our Heritage

Built on
Trust &
Craftsmanship

Since 1993, Goga Neelam Ghar & Furniture has been Lahore's most beloved destination for premium home and office furniture. Founded by Muhammad Ashraf and now led by CEO Usman Ashraf, we carry forward a 30-year legacy of quality and trust.

Located at Qartaba Chowk on Ferozepur Road, Mozang — our showroom carries the widest selection of styles, budgets, and finishes in Lahore.

Who We Are

Our Story

A legacy of craftsmanship, trust, and beautiful homes — since 1993

Goga Neelam Ghar & Furniture

Lahore's Most Beloved
Furniture Destination

Nestled at Qartaba Chowk on Ferozepur Road, near Abid Market in Mozang Chungi, Lahore — Goga Neelam Ghar & Furniture has been a household name since 1993. Founded by Muhammad Ashraf with a vision to make quality furniture accessible to every family, the business has grown into one of Lahore's most trusted furniture destinations — now led by his son, CEO Usman Ashraf.

We carry an extensive range of furniture for every need — beautiful living room sets, complete bedroom collections, grand dining suites, bespoke office furniture, and full dowry packages for newlyweds starting their journey together.

Whether you're furnishing your first home, upgrading your office, or putting together the perfect jaheez — our team is here to guide you through every step with honest advice, fair pricing, and furniture that truly lasts.

What We Stand For

Our Values

🏛️

Heritage Craft

30+ years of furniture expertise passed down through dedicated craftsmanship and deep community roots in Lahore.

✨

Quality First

Every piece — whether economy or premium — is selected and crafted to meet our uncompromising standards of durability and finish.

💛

Fair Pricing

We believe every family deserves beautiful furniture. Our pricing is transparent, honest, and competitive across all ranges.

🤝

Personal Service

Our staff takes time to understand your needs, space, and budget — guiding you to the perfect choice every time.

The People Behind The Legacy

Meet Our Leadership

The Founder
Founder
Muhammad Ashraf
Founder · Est. 1993

In 1993, Muhammad Ashraf started Goga Neelam Ghar from scratch with a powerful mission: to provide high-quality, durable furniture at affordable prices so that no family is deprived of a beautiful home.

His relentless hard work and dedication turned this vision into one of Lahore's most respected furniture landmarks — a name synonymous with trust, quality, and warmth in the community of Mozang Chungi.

M. Ashraf
Founder, Goga Neelam Ghar & Furniture
Chief Executive
Chief Executive Officer
Usman Ashraf
Leading Since 2007

Usman Ashraf joined the business in 2007, carrying forward his father's immense legacy with a modern perspective. As a passionate businessman, he has expanded the brand's horizons — ensuring that every piece of furniture reflects the family's commitment to excellence and contemporary style.

Under his leadership, Goga Neelam Ghar has grown into a comprehensive furniture destination serving residential, office, and dowry clients across Lahore and beyond.

Usman Ashraf
CEO, Goga Neelam Ghar & Furniture

Stories from Our Community

★★★★★
"

Good for people who are not able to buy furniture from high rates of shops. Honest people, great selection. I furnished my entire home here at very fair prices.

JA
Jamil Ahmed
Homeowner · Lahore
★★★★★
"

All good. Located near Qartaba Chowk — before Abid Market on Ferozepur Road. Prices are quite economical compared to other places and there's such wide variety.

OS
Obaid Sajid
Interior Designer
★★★★★
"

I wanted a custom cupboard — 6ft x 2ft — made for just Rs 6,000. The quality was appropriate and still going great months later. Absolutely recommend visiting.

AS
Asif Saleem
Custom Order Client
★★★★★
"

Have both new and used furniture — rates are very reasonable for all customers. I bought a complete bedroom set and the staff helped me pick within my budget perfectly.

Cost effective and very good condition furniture especially for jaheez and offices. Best place in Lahore for dowry furniture — the variety is incredible. Highly recommended.
